ceb.about 1435–before 9 May 1480: mga 1435–sa wala pa ang 9 sa Mayo 1480
ceb.before 9 May 1480: sa wala pa ang 9 sa Mayo 1480

英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特
zh.Raith House, Raith, Lake Fife, Kirkcaldy: 英國蘇格蘭費伏吉卡爾迪
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Bethune V of Belfour於大約1435年出生在蘇格蘭費伏時，他的父親John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour19歲，母親Catherine Stirling21歲。他於1458年與Marjory Boswell在蘇格蘭費伏結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1480年5月9日之前在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特
zh-hans.Raith House, Raith, Lake Fife, Kirkcaldy: 英国苏格兰費伏吉卡爾迪
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Bethune V of Belfour于大约1435年出生在苏格兰費伏时，他的父亲John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour19岁，母亲Catherine Stirling21岁。他于1458年与Marjory Boswell在苏格兰費伏结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1480年5月9日之前在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Bethune V of Belfour was born about 1435, in Fife, Scotland, his father, John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour, was 19 and his mother, Catherine Stirling, was 21. He married Marjory Boswell in 1458, in Fife, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 6 daughters. He died before 9 May 1480, in his hometown, and was buried in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Bethune V of Belfour est né environ 1435, à Fife, Écosse, son père, John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Catherine Stirling, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Marjory Boswell en 1458, à Fife, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé avant 9 mai 1480, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Bethune V of Belfour um 1435 in Fife, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour 19 und seine Mutter Catherine Stirling 21. Er hat 1458 in Fife, Scotland Marjory Boswell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb vor 9. Mai 1480 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Bethune V of Belfour è nato il circa 1435 nel Fife, Scotland, il suo padre, John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Stirling, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Marjory Boswell nel 1458, nel Fife, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 6 figlie. Morì prima del 9 maggio 1480, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Manchester, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Bethune V of Belfourが約1435年にスコットランドフィフで生まれた時，父John de Bethune, 4th of Balfourは19歳，母Catherine Stirlingは21歳であった。1458年にスコットランドフィフでMarjory Boswellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年5月9日以前に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bethune V of Belfour(이)가 대략 1435년 스컷랜드 피프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Stirling(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1458년 스컷랜드 피프에서 Marjory Boswell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1480년 5월 9일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Bethune V of Belfour nasceu aproximadamente 1435, em Fife, Scotland, seu pai, John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Stirling, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Marjory Boswell em 1458, em Fife, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 9 de maio de 1480, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Bethune V of Belfour родился около 1435 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия, его отцу по имени John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Stirling, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjory Boswell в 1458 г. в местности фиф, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер перед 9 май 1480 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Bethune V of Belfour nació aproximadamente 1435, en Fife, Scotland, su papá, John de Bethune, 4th of Balfour, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Catherine Stirling, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Marjory Boswell en 1458, en Fife, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió antes de 9 de mayo de 1480, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
